message:
fix(embed): remove unsafe pre-rename delete in write_atomic_file

On POSIX, fs::rename atomically replaces the destination file. The
explicit remove_file before rename created a crash-unsafe window where
the file is gone entirely if the process crashes between the delete
and the rename. Same class of bug fixed earlier in file_protector's
restore_backup (bf07af96).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
